summary: Both REQ-28 and REQ-29 appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-28 is addressed in GameTimer.tsx with black text colors applied to all timer labels and values, with warning/critical states only affecting background/border/animation. REQ-29 is addressed in GamePage.tsx with an End Turn button wired to the endTurn function from useGameEngine, using SkipForward icon and parchment-themed styling. The truncation of GamePage.tsx prevents full verification of the disable/hide logic and bot-turn handling, but the import of SkipForward and endTurn hook usage are visible.
